mapper.update: UPDATE player p JOIN ( SELECT gbl.player_name AS name, CASE gbl.team_side WHEN 'AWAY' THEN g.away_team ELSE g.home_team END AS team, SUM(gbl.at_bats) AS ab, SUM(gbl.hits) AS h, SUM(gbl.rbi) AS rbi, COUNT(DISTINCT gbl.game_id) AS games FROM game_batter_log gbl JOIN game g ON g.id = gbl.game_id GROUP BY gbl.player_name, team ) batter_agg ON p.name = batter_agg.name AND p.team = batter_agg.team LEFT JOIN ( SELECT gbl_hr.player_name, CASE gbl_hr.team_side WHEN 'AWAY' THEN g_hr.away_team ELSE g_hr.home_team END AS team, COUNT(*) AS hr_count FROM game_batter_log gbl_hr JOIN JSON_TABLE(gbl_hr.inning_results, '$[*]' COLUMNS (val VARCHAR(20) PATH '$')) jt ON jt.val LIKE '%홈%' JOIN game g_hr ON g_hr.id = gbl_hr.game_id GROUP BY gbl_hr.player_name, team ) hr_agg ON hr_agg.player_name = p.name AND hr_agg.team = p.team SET p.at_bats = batter_agg.ab, p.hits = batter_agg.h, p.rbi = batter_agg.rbi, p.games = batter_agg.games, p.home_runs = COALESCE(hr_agg.hr_count, 0), p.batting_avg = CASE WHEN batter_agg.ab > 0 THEN ROUND(batter_agg.h / batter_agg.ab, 3) ELSE NULL END WHERE p.player_type = 'BATTER'

UPDATE player_batter_stats bs JOIN player p ON p.id = bs.player_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT gbl.player_name AS name, CASE gbl.team_side WHEN 'AWAY' THEN g.away_team ELSE g.home_team END AS team, SUM(gbl.at_bats) AS ab, SUM(gbl.hits) AS h, SUM(gbl.walks) AS bb FROM game_batter_log gbl JOIN game g ON g.id = gbl.game_id GROUP BY gbl.player_name, team ) basic ON basic.name = p.name AND basic.team = p.team LEFT JOIN ( SELECT gbl2.player_name AS name, CASE gbl2.team_side WHEN 'AWAY' THEN g2.away_team ELSE g2.home_team END AS team, SUM(CASE WHEN jt.v LIKE '%홈%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hr, SUM(CASE WHEN jt.v REGEXP '^(좌|우|중|좌중|우중)2$' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS doubles_, SUM(CASE WHEN jt.v REGEXP '^(좌|우|중|좌중|우중)3$' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS triples_, SUM(CASE WHEN jt.v LIKE '%삼진%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS so, SUM(CASE WHEN jt.v LIKE '%사구%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hbp, SUM(CASE WHEN jt.v LIKE '%희비%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sf, SUM(CASE WHEN jt.v LIKE '%희번%' OR jt.v LIKE '%희실%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sh, SUM(CASE WHEN jt.v LIKE '%병%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dp, SUM(CASE WHEN jt.v LIKE '%고4%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ibb FROM game_batter_log gbl2 JOIN JSON_TABLE(gbl2.inning_results, '$[*]' COLUMNS (v VARCHAR(20) PATH '$')) jt ON 1=1 JOIN game g2 ON g2.id = gbl2.game_id GROUP BY gbl2.player_name, team ) parsed ON parsed.name = p.name AND parsed.team = p.team SET bs.at_bats = COALESCE(basic.ab, 0), bs.walks = COALESCE(basic.bb, 0), bs.doubles = COALESCE(parsed.doubles_, 0), bs.triples = COALESCE(parsed.triples_, 0), bs.strikeouts = COALESCE(parsed.so, 0), bs.hit_by_pitch = COALESCE(parsed.hbp, 0), bs.sacrifice_flies = COALESCE(parsed.sf, 0), bs.sacrifice_hits = COALESCE(parsed.sh, 0), bs.double_plays = COALESCE(parsed.dp, 0), bs.intentional_walks = COALESCE(parsed.ibb, 0), bs.total_bases = COALESCE(basic.h, 0) + COALESCE(parsed.doubles_, 0) + 2 * COALESCE(parsed.triples_, 0) + 3 * COALESCE(parsed.hr, 0), bs.plate_appearances = COALESCE(basic.ab, 0) + COALESCE(basic.bb, 0) + COALESCE(parsed.hbp, 0) + COALESCE(parsed.sf, 0) + COALESCE(parsed.sh, 0), bs.slugging_pct = CASE WHEN COALESCE(basic.ab, 0) > 0 THEN ROUND( (COALESCE(basic.h, 0) + COALESCE(parsed.doubles_, 0) + 2 * COALESCE(parsed.triples_, 0) + 3 * COALESCE(parsed.hr, 0)) / basic.ab, 3) ELSE 0 END, bs.on_base_pct = CASE WHEN (COALESCE(basic.ab, 0) + COALESCE(basic.bb, 0) + COALESCE(parsed.hbp, 0) + COALESCE(parsed.sf, 0)) > 0 THEN ROUND( (COALESCE(basic.h, 0) + COALESCE(basic.bb, 0) + COALESCE(parsed.hbp, 0)) / (COALESCE(basic.ab, 0) + COALESCE(basic.bb, 0) + COALESCE(parsed.hbp, 0) + COALESCE(parsed.sf, 0)), 3) ELSE 0 END, bs.ops = COALESCE(bs.on_base_pct, 0) + COALESCE(bs.slugging_pct, 0) WHERE p.player_type = 'BATTER'

UPDATE player_pitcher_stats ps JOIN player p ON p.id = ps.player_id JOIN ( SELECT gpl.player_name AS name, CASE gpl.team_side WHEN 'AWAY' THEN g.away_team ELSE g.home_team END AS team, SUM(gpl.innings_pitched_outs) AS outs, SUM(gpl.hits_against) AS h, SUM(gpl.home_runs_against) AS hr, SUM(gpl.walks_hbp) AS bb_hbp, SUM(gpl.strikeouts) AS so, SUM(gpl.runs_allowed) AS r, SUM(gpl.earned_runs) AS er, SUM(gpl.batters_faced) AS bf, SUM(gpl.pitches) AS pitches, SUM(gpl.at_bats_against) AS ab_against, SUM(CASE WHEN gpl.result = 'LOSE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS losses, SUM(CASE WHEN gpl.innings_pitched_outs >= 18 AND gpl.earned_runs <= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS qs FROM game_pitcher_log gpl JOIN game g ON g.id = gpl.game_id GROUP BY gpl.player_name, team ) agg ON agg.name = p.name AND agg.team = p.team SET ps.innings_outs = agg.outs, ps.hits_allowed = agg.h, ps.home_runs_allowed = agg.hr, ps.walks_allowed = agg.bb_hbp, ps.hbp_allowed = 0, ps.strikeouts = agg.so, ps.runs_allowed = agg.r, ps.earned_runs = agg.er, ps.batters_faced = agg.bf, ps.pitches_thrown = agg.pitches, ps.losses = agg.losses, ps.quality_starts = agg.qs, ps.whip = CASE WHEN agg.outs > 0 THEN ROUND((agg.h + agg.bb_hbp) * 3.0 / agg.outs, 2) ELSE 0 END, ps.opponent_avg = CASE WHEN agg.ab_against > 0 THEN ROUND(agg.h / agg.ab_against, 3) ELSE 0 END, ps.win_pct = CASE WHEN (p.wins + agg.losses) > 0 THEN ROUND(p.wins / (p.wins + agg.losses), 3) ELSE 0 END WHERE p.player_type = 'PITCHER'
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO player_batter_stats (player_id) SELECT id FROM player WHERE player_type = 'BATTER'
INSERT IGNORE INTO player_pitcher_stats (player_id) SELECT id FROM player WHERE player_type = 'PITCHER'
mapper.update: UPDATE player p JOIN ( SELECT gpl.player_name AS name, CASE gpl.team_side WHEN 'AWAY' THEN g.away_team ELSE g.home_team END AS team, SUM(gpl.innings_pitched_outs) AS total_outs, SUM(gpl.earned_runs) AS er, SUM(CASE WHEN gpl.result = 'WIN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wins, SUM(CASE WHEN gpl.result = 'SAVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS saves, SUM(CASE WHEN gpl.result = 'HOLD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS holds, COUNT(DISTINCT gpl.game_id) AS games FROM game_pitcher_log gpl JOIN game g ON g.id = gpl.game_id GROUP BY gpl.player_name, team ) agg ON p.name = agg.name AND p.team = agg.team SET p.innings_pitched_outs = agg.total_outs, p.wins = agg.wins, p.saves = agg.saves, p.holds = agg.holds, p.games = agg.games, p.era = CASE WHEN agg.total_outs > 0 THEN ROUND(agg.er * 27.0 / agg.total_outs, 2) ELSE NULL END WHERE p.player_type = 'PITCHER'
